item.title: Turned to the Darkside
item.description: Visted a close friend today. We go way back. He always leaned to the right politically, but he jumped the fence to conspiracy land. What I found saddening is that for being a devoted Christian, he has turned away from the "love thy neighbor " to being racist. Russians & Ukrainians shouldn't be fighting each other "because they are white". I don't understand how people become fixated and obsessed with religion and politics. I went to enjoy a visit, not to hear of a new world order or that Satan is destroying the world. (sigh)
item.dc:creator: MrNobodyLivesHere

item.dc:creator: neoswhiterabbitt

item.title: sister, brother and 2 aunts raided my late dad's safe deposit box that i had the only key to
item.description: Void shouting incoming: (edit: holy shit fp!) My dad died in 2021 and the last remnant of his 'estate' was a safe deposit box that i had the only key to and that my family had been bugging me to clear out since then. My dad was not as savvy a businessman as some people thought and i expected the box to have nothing in it. I live in California and getting to the bank where the box is was difficult - a flight to Colorado and then another 200 miles into rural western Nebraska. I had told my dad not to involve me with disbursing his estate as i would not be able to account for my time and travel fairly - however much was left over was unlikely to even cover my travel expenses. wHaT's iN tEh b0x? turns out about 2450 to split 5 ways. Aunt decided to get a court affidavit (technically legal, just very underhanded) to access the box and clear out the contents. I found out when the bank called me about a glitch - trying to fund a safe deposit that no longer existed. They had this fantasy that the box held fabulous riches and couldn't wait to find out just how fabulous those riches were. So nobody - including my brother - told me this was happening. The best part? Idve gladly sent the key to not have to schlep to the middle of goddamned nowhere (Oshkosh NE). They seemed to think that I'd simply never figure it out and now that i have they evidently never gave a shit one way or the other if i did. So, the proceeds got split 4 ways instead of 5. My family ratfucked me for $490. My brother sat on that information for over a year. $122.50 each was apparently more than a relationship with me was worth. It was too much to just send a text 'yo i gotta lay something on you' and just stay out of it to let my aunt dig her own hole. It was never about the money; it was about the autonomy. I got used to being pushed around as a kid and young adult. Ive recently started standing up for myself and it seems they're uncomfortable with that. i maintained that i would deal with it in due time and that the current situation was avoidable. Any issues they had were not my responsibility, not my fault and not my problem. I told my aunt that she is dead to me. My other aunt is old and sick and will be dead soon. My half sister i rarely speak to. My brother though, that's the real heart breaker. I may or may not ever speak to him again. I'm certainly not going to initiate contact. I spent many years as a literal goddamned punching bag and then i got sold out for the equivalent of a tank of gas and a carton of cigarettes. good news is I'll save money on Christmas cards from here on out. Thanks for reading.
item.dc:creator: CobainsSarcoma

item.title: the harpy's meme library: volume 45 (stair boy)
item.description:
Hello and welcome to another meme dump, my imgur friends. Hold on a moment, I just need to- *UNINTELLIGIBLE HARPY SHRIEKING* ...Okay. That feels better. Now, let us venture onwards to memes!
I've officially reached the part of my life where new slang confuses me, and I have to look it up like this cat
Boy have I got a guy for you!
I do this to Otto daily, he's my Big Dumb Idiot Boy and I love him
Me when I get a new glasses prescription and am amazed that trees have individual leaves and aren't just big green blobs. Like look at that shit, moving in the wind. Thousands of them! Amazing.
@CodyBurkett
Ahhh yes, a regular occurrence in my existence. "Oh hey, my hands are shaking, why are they shaking? *stares at clock* ...ohhhhh right. I forgot to eat. Whoops."
It's my right boob. The left one is fine, the right one is a lil' bitch sometimes.
H O N K
OH BOY GUYS GET READY YOU'RE ABOUT TO LEARN EVERYTHING I KNOW ABOUT *insert obscure bullshit no one cares about*
*BONKsqueak*
Cone of shame boy tax. Also the reason I'm gonna end up falling down these stairs one day. #theotto That's all for this dump, my imgur friends. Until next time, don't forget to be awesome.
item.dc:creator: SecretHarpy

item.title: literally how I dress on my days off
item.description: Just showing a typical outfit for me. I like to express myself through my clothing, although in real life I am very introverted. I don’t speak much unless I’m spoken to, so my outer self expression gets to speak a bit for me.

item.dc:creator: TheWoodsAreVile

item.title: Update on Jasmine
item.description:
My new foster kitten Jasmine had a terrible start to life. She and her three brothers were found alone outside an abandoned house, and she had a terrible eye infection. One of her brothers did not make it, and a vet tech named Jasmine spent hours nursing the other three back to health. Kitten Jasmine has such a severe eye infection in her left eye that the vet today told me she is going to lose it. She has some scarring on her right eye, too, but it’s not too bad. She’s not in any pain that we can tell, so once she’s strong enough, they’ll remove the left eye.
She is doing so well after over a week on antibiotics. I bathed her a couple of days ago, and today she started grooming herself!
She also is not afraid to make it known that she wants delicious num nums.
Yes ma’am, here’s some food. She has a fantastic appetite and is gaining weight every day.
Her brothers are super healthy and way bigger than she is. Since her vision is so bad, she kinda just follows them around with her tail flicking back and forth. She really wants to play with them but they don’t understand she’s slower than them. I threw a noisy ball in there tonight, and she did a great job of pushing it around for a while. You better believe I threw ten more noisy balls in there before I left lol
I really wish I could post videos because I have the cutest vids of her walking around and being precious. I’ve deleted and re-installed the app, emailed the Imgur support inbox twice, messaged @MartynMage and @satan but nothing has worked. A few of you have said that it might work better on a desktop, but mine is currently not working. So it’ll be pictures for now. Anyone have any other ideas?
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: History repeating itself
item.description: Those that do not study History will repeat themselves
item.dc:creator: DenverTech

item.title: Finally got to finish an old game of mine!
item.description: I was told about the emulator for the smart phones called, delta. I was able to play an old game I had as a kid called, “Advance Wars 2”. Never could beat it as a kid but I loved the game. I wanted to know how it ended. Well, fast forward 20 years and I got to do just that. With the emulator’s cheat code input system I finally rushed through to the point I couldn’t beat and finish the story.
item.dc:creator: Hotsauceman
